changes.value:
## What

`kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-card.tsx` uses HTML `title=` on the inspect button:
- Line 180: `title="Inspect"`

Replace with `<Tooltip><TooltipTrigger asChild>...<TooltipContent>`.

**Files to modify:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-card.tsx`
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-card.test.tsx` — update selectors querying `button[title='Inspect']` (lines 179, 203)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Inspect button shows styled Radix tooltip on hover
- [ ] No HTML `title=` attributes remain in entity-card.tsx
- [ ] Tests updated and passing

## Tests
- [ ] Update `entity-card.test.tsx` selectors
- [ ] Run `cd kanban-app && pnpm vitest run` — all tests pass
Replace title= with shadcn Tooltip in entity-card.tsx

+## What

Replace HTML `title=` on inspect button with shadcn Tooltip.

**MANDATORY: TDD — write/update tests FIRST (RED), then implement (GREEN).**

**Files to modify:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-card.test.tsx` — update selectors from `button[title='Inspect']` to `button[aria-label='Inspect']` FIRST
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-card.tsx` — replace `title=` with Tooltip + `aria-label`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests updated FIRST (RED), then code changed (GREEN)
- [ ] Styled tooltip on hover
- [ ] No HTML `title=` in entity-card.tsx

## Tests
- [ ] Updated entity-card.test.tsx selectors (RED first)
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm vitest run entity-card` — all pass"
\ No newline at end of file
